name: Gravatar Avatars
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Shows Gravatar profile pictures for email contacts using the Gravatar API

size.label: Image size (px)
size.description: Size of the Gravatar image in pixels (16–512)

rating.label: Maximum content rating
rating.description: Gravatar images above this rating will not be shown

defaultStyle.label: Fallback style
defaultStyle.description: Image style to use when an email has no Gravatar profile. '404' skips Gravatar for that address.
